column1: # DEV-200 pairs whose C++-vs-oracle OMR-NED divergence is explained by a
# documented importer difference (D6), not by the comparison engine.
# reports Spearman with and without these pairs.
# 1. converter21 signature restating on rhythm-broken kern: the oracle's kern
#    parse restates clef+keysig+timesig in every measure, so its measure
#    alignment collapses and its OMR-NED saturates near 1.0 while the C++
#    parse stays healthy. See docs/validation.md for the audit summary.
#    tremolos): the affected notes' tuplet symbols and offsets are
#    unrepresentable on the C++ side; flagged in the Tier-A count audit.
